title: taraxacum palpitans
intro: Taraxacum palpitans, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum palpitans lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which are rich in bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, sesquiterpene lactones, and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and constipation, and its health benefits also include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Taraxacum palpitans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in capsules or tablets, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy for various health concerns.
